success.subtitle: Open the file you just downloaded to finish installing Decentraland and start {action}

step1.title: Open
step1.text: Open the Decentraland file from your Downloads Folder to launch the Setup Wizard.

step2.title: Install
step2.text: Follow the instructions in the Setup Wizard. When you click Finish the installation process will begin.

step3.title: Get Ready to Explore!
step3.text: Once installation is complete, the Decentraland app should be visible in your taskbar and will launch automatically.

step1.title: Open
step1.text: Click on the Decentraland file from your browser's 'Recent Downloads' or your 'Downloads' folder to open it.

step2.title: Install
step2.text: This window should then appear—double click the Decentraland button to start installation.

step3.title: Get Ready to Explore!
step3.text: Once installation is complete, the Decentraland app should be visible in your Dock and will launch automatically.

step1.title: Open
step1.text: Click on the Decentraland file from your browser's 'Recent Downloads' or your 'Downloads' folder to open it.

step2.title: Install
step2.text: This window should then appear—double click the Decentraland button to start installation.

step3.title: Get Ready to Explore!
step3.text: Once installation is complete, the Decentraland app should be visible in your Dock and will launch automatically.

creator-hub.title: Download Decentraland Creator Hub
creator-hub.description: Download the Creator Hub to start building immersive scenes and interactive experiences in Decentraland.

step1.title: Open
step1.text: Open the Decentraland Creator Hub file from your Downloads Folder to begin the installation process.

step2.title: Install
step2.text: Click Install and then Finish. Decentraland Creator Hub will automatically start.

step1.title: Open
step1.text: Open the Decentraland Creator Hub file from your Downloads Folder to begin the installation process.

step2.title: Install
step2.text: Drag and drop Decentraland Creator Hub to the Applications folder. You might be asked to enter the admin password.

step3.title: Get Ready
step3.text: Locate Decentraland Creator Hub in your Applications Folder and Start Building.

hero.title: Close the Feed. Come Hang Out.

social.title: Join Decentraland - A Virtual World Built by Its Community
social.description: Customize your avatar, hang out with people around the world, and discover Decentraland. Start from your browser, then download the app to enter.

hero.title: invited you to join Decentraland
hero.subtitle: A social virtual world where you can connect, create, and be yourself

second_hero.title: Hang out in Decentraland
second_hero.subtitle: Meet people from around the world, attend live events, and customize your digital self -- all in a virtual world owned by its community.

get_started.step2: Download the Decentraland app for desktop
get_started.step3: Jump into Decentraland and meet up with {referrer}!

faq.item_0_answer:
Decentraland is a community-driven virtual world where you can connect, explore, and create. Built on the Unity engine, Decentraland streams and renders a vast, continuous environment filled with diverse, user-generated content. As you explore this immersive landscape, you encounter new creations daily, from games and puzzles to scenes and artworks, all crafted by Decentraland's vibrant community of creators.

Decentraland goes beyond traditional gaming experiences. In Decentraland, you can attend live music events, conferences, exhibitions, dance parties, and more.

Your New Friends Are Waiting -- Download Decentraland today and jump in!
faq.item_1_answer:
Step 1: Download and Install the Client
First you will need to install the client, go to Decentraland and click download.

Step 2: Create your Account
When you enter Decentraland, you can use a standard web3 wallet such as Metamask, or log in with a Social account (Google, Discord, X, or Apple).

Step 3: Customize Your Avatar
Once you enter Decentraland you'll first be asked to customize your avatar.

Step 4: Explore!
After completing a quick tutorial, Decentraland is yours to explore!

Step 5: Have fun!
Walk around, talk to others via the chat box, and pop into some events!
faq.item_2_question: Do I need cryptocurrency or a digital wallet to use Decentraland?
faq.item_2_answer:
You do not need to own cryptocurrency to enjoy Decentraland as it is free to use. If you decide to purchase a community-made creation from the Marketplace, there are multiple payment options available, such as credit/debit card and bank transfer in addition to various cryptocurrencies.

As for owning a digital wallet, if you don't already have one, you don't need to get one yourself. When you sign in to Decentraland for the first time, a digital wallet will be created for you behind the scenes if you choose to use a Social account.
faq.item_3_question: How do I become a Decentraland Creator?
faq.item_3_answer:
Decentraland is a world created by its users, meaning you can be a creator of everything from Wearables, Emotes, entire scenes with buildings and/or landscapes, interactive experiences, and games.

Most Wearable and Emote designers use Blender to design their creations. Once complete, items are submitted for publishing in the Marketplace.

You can also download the Creator Hub which combines all of the ease of use of the Web Editor with the power of writing code.
faq.item_4_answer: Costing just 100 MANA, the currency of Decentraland, a Decentraland NAME is essentially a unique and personalized username for your avatar that represents your virtual identity within the Decentraland ecosystem. Getting a Decentraland NAME comes with the added bonus of granting the owner their own World.
faq.item_5_question: What is the difference between LANDs and Worlds?
faq.item_5_answer:
Currently, Worlds can only admit up to 100 visitors at a time and scenes are limited to 100MB whereas LAND parcels have no such limitations. If you would like to build large scenes or host big events, buying or renting LAND will be a better option.

Scenes deployed on LANDs in Genesis City are also more easily discovered by users as they don't need to know your NAME to visit.
faq.item_6_question: How can I get help and contact the Support Team?
faq.item_6_answer: You can contact the Decentraland Support Team via live chat or you can join the official Decentraland Discord server. Please remember that Decentraland staff will never ask you for the private key (seed phrase) to your crypto wallet.

social_proof.item_0_quote: Even though I'm not good at English, I enjoy participating in events and chatting with avatars that gradually become my friends. Decentraland is my metaverse home.
social_proof.item_1_quote: Decentraland is a place to meet people I wouldn't have the chance to meet in the real world. It allows me to make new friends, collaborate with the community, and fully explore my potential.
social_proof.item_2_quote: I love Decentraland because it brings together my passions; It's a creative playground for both technical and artistic skills, all within the web3 philosophy, where I truly feel like I own a part of the future.
social_proof.item_3_quote: What excites me about Decentraland is that it provides talented architects with a platform and the tools to recreate in a virtual world incredible structures that are either too far away to visit or have been lost to modern development.
social_proof.item_4_quote: I'm forever thankful that I was welcomed with such a warm embrace, Decentraland truly changed the trajectory of a lot of things in my life and I've met amazing people thanks to it.

social.title: Decentraland | Come Hang Out
social.description: Decentraland is where you hang out online. Join movie screenings, live music, trivia, and other community events. Show up anytime and see who’s around.

mobile_modal.description: Decentraland is currently only available via desktop. Enter your email to be notified as soon as we're on mobile devices.

main.title: Welcome to Decentraland
main.description: Create, explore and trade in the first-ever virtual world owned by its users.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Lose yourself in an amazing, evolving world
explore.description: Explore LANDs owned by users to experience incredible scenes and structures. From a space adventure to a medieval dungeon maze to entire villages crafted from the minds of community members.

create.title: Create
create.subtitle: Test the limits of your imagination
create.description: Create scenes, artworks, challenges and more, using the simple Builder tool, then take part in events to win prizes. For more experienced creators, the SDK provides the tools to fill the world with social games and applications.

trade.title: Trade
trade.subtitle: The virtual destination for digital assets
trade.description: Buy and sell LAND, Estates, Avatar wearables and names in the Decentraland Marketplace: stocking the very best digital goods and paraphernalia backed by the ethereum blockchain.

dao.title: About Decentraland
dao.subtitle: Determine the future of the virtual world
dao.description: The first fully decentralized world, Decentraland is controlled via the DAO, which owns the most important smart contracts and assets of Decentraland. Via the DAO, you decide and vote on how the world works.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: You'll find us at all hours on Discord. You can also reach us through the usual channels.

subscribe.title: Get the latest updates
subscribe.description: Breaking news on events, competitions and new developments in Decentraland, delivered straight to your inbox

press.title: Decentraland Press Kit
press.description: Download Decentraland press materials and brand assets
press.page_description: We've put together all sorts of goodies that you're welcome to use when writing and talking about our project. Please direct any questions to

support.title: Decentraland - Help Center
support.description: Get help with Decentraland. Browse FAQs, check service status, and contact support.

newsletter.title: Get the weekly highlights in your inbox

faq_section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_section.paragraph: Don't see your question below? Check out our full FAQ resources
faq_section.item_0_answer: Decentraland is an open-source, community-driven virtual world where users can create, experience, and monetize content and applications. It runs on the Ethereum blockchain and allows users to purchase virtual land and build interactive experiences.
faq_section.item_1_answer: You can enter Decentraland by visiting decentraland.org/download to get the desktop client for the best experience, or jump in directly from your browser at decentraland.org/play. Create a free avatar and start exploring right away.
faq_section.item_2_question: Do I need cryptocurrency or a digital wallet to use Decentraland?
faq_section.item_2_answer: No, you can explore Decentraland for free without cryptocurrency or a digital wallet. However, if you want to buy LAND, wearables, NAMEs, or other items, you will need a digital wallet and MANA or other supported cryptocurrencies.
faq_section.item_3_question: How do I become a Decentraland Creator?
faq_section.item_3_answer: Anyone can become a Decentraland Creator! Visit the Creator Hub at decentraland.org/create to access the Scene Editor and SDK tools. You can build interactive 3D scenes, design wearables, and publish content to the world.
faq_section.item_4_answer: A NAME is a unique, human-readable identity in Decentraland represented as an NFT. Instead of being identified by a wallet address, NAMEs allow other users to easily find and recognize you in the virtual world.
faq_section.item_5_question: What is the difference between LANDs and Worlds?
faq_section.item_5_answer: LANDs are non-fungible digital assets (ERC-721) representing permanent parcels within the Decentraland map. Worlds are personal, off-map spaces where anyone can deploy scenes without owning LAND, making it easier for creators to build and share experiences.
faq_section.item_6_question: How can I get help and contact the Support Team?
faq_section.item_6_answer: You can reach the Support Team directly using the chat box on the bottom right of this page. You can also browse our FAQ resources at docs.decentraland.org or check our community channels for additional help.

center.title: Help Center
center.paragraph: Browse through FAQs and Support Updates or speak with the Support Team directly using the chat box on the bottom right.

support_updates_section.title: Support Updates
support_updates_section.item_0_answer:
Client:

Features:
- Expanded settings
- Ghosts (avatars will appear as ghosts when loading)

Fixes:
- Promote to speaker sets as muted by default
- Fixed deploy of avatar outfits/customization
- Avoid showing the black event counter on no live events on the Navigation Bar
support_updates_section.item_1_answer:
Features:
- Spawn Areas: You can now see a visual representation of spawn areas directly in the scene editor, and adjust spawn areas visually, including random offset ranges.
- Dynamic Asset Catalog with SDK Compatibility: The asset catalog now loads the latest version from the CDN at runtime, so new assets appear automatically without waiting for a full app update.
- World Access Permissions: The "Access" tab is now available in Worlds settings, letting you manage who can enter your world directly from the Creator Hub.

Fixes:
- Scene Layout in Advanced Mode: The scene layout now updates correctly when editing in advanced mode.
- Duplicated Ground in Scenes: Opening a scene no longer renders a duplicated ground plane.
- Fetch Managed Projects: Fixed a failure when loading managed projects.
- Windows Code Signing: The Windows build pipeline now properly fails on code-signing errors instead of silently producing unsigned executables.
- Removed Legacy Dependency: Replaced the deprecated decentraland-connect library with a lighter vendored implementation using viem, reducing bundle size.

Improvements:
- UI Polish: Updated colors, component styles, transform alignment, entity inspector header, entity renaming, and asset tab styling for a better editing experience.
- Collaborators Tab Copy: Updated the text in the collaborators tab with clearer guidance.
support_updates_section.item_2_answer:
Backface Culling is now set to On on the engine by default on all model materials.

Why: Significant Performance Optimization.
How: Because it is an engine optimization, it also affects materials that are already published.

Action Points:
We encourage you to check your scenes following the Troubleshooting section in the documentation.

Some scenarios worth checking first:
- Flags, curtains, walls made of Planes: If a wall made of a plane with a single-sided material, it won't be seen from the other side.
- Grass / Leaves of a tree made of Planes with single-sided materials: Same case as above.
- Interior of Cubes and other shapes that act as rooms: If the cube material is facing out, it won't be seen from the inside.
support_updates_section.item_3_answer:
With the focus on the Creator Hub, the Visual Studio Extension is no longer supported.

The Extension has been removed from the VS Marketplace.
support_updates_section.item_4_answer:
Below is a guide on how to find and generate the Player.log file. These files can be helpful when it comes to troubleshooting issues reported.

Open the chat in the Decentraland Desktop app and type: /logs

Or:

For Windows:
Navigate to: C:\Users\{YourUserName}\AppData\LocalLow\Decentraland\Explorer
Find the file named Player.log

For Mac:
Open Finder and press Cmd + Shift + G to open the "Go to Folder" dialog.
Enter the path: /Users/UserName/Library/Logs/Decentraland/Explorer/
Find the file named Player.log

Player.log file would show issues with the current/active session.
Player-prev.log file would show issues with the previous session.

Launcher Logs (output.log):
Windows: C:\Users\username\AppData\Roaming\DecentralandLauncherLight
Mac: /Users/UserName/Library/Logs/DecentralandLauncherLight
